title: festuca pulchella var. angustifolia
intro: Festuca pulchella var. angustifolia, also known as a narrow-leaved blue fescue or angustifolia blue fescue, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and may also have antioxidant properties. Festuca pulchella var. angustifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
